elective_text:
Elective courses which are academic courses (Composition/Research+Pedagogy) are marked 
with * in the form above. 
v). All courses listed in other majors or those offered as Free Electives by other schools can be taken 
as Free Electives at the instructor’s discretion. 
註： 
i). 專題研習是指以論文來評分的學術題目研究。 
ii). 特別專案是指表演實踐，例如全學院的歌劇演出。 
iii). 學生應盡量在第一學期修讀 一科三學分的英語科目，一科三 學分的中文科目及一科 一學
分的大學核心課程科目，及在第二學期修讀 一科三學分的英語科目及兩科一 學分的大學
核心課程科目。 
iv). 上表以*標注了自由選修科目中的理論類科目（作曲/研習+教學法） 。 
v). 學生可在徵得授課老師同意後選修其他主修課程的科目及由其他學院開設的自由選修科
目作為自由選修科目。

Last Update: 1 4 July 2025 
[a] All School Package (except BIO1008 and PHY1001), Major Required and Major 
Elective courses will be included in the calculation of Major GPA for honours 
classification. 
 
[b] Streams of Specialization 
There are five streams of specialization: Methodology and Theory Stream, Finance and 
Economics Stream, Operations Management Stream, Life Science Stream, and 
Computing Stream. Students may choose to specialize in one of the five streams by 
selecting the courses as prescribed. To qualify for a specialized stream, students must 
complete at least 4 courses under the stream. Students can only declare one stream of 
specialization at their expected graduation term. Students may also decide not to 
declare any Stream, in which case they will not be subject to the Stream requirements.

[a] All School Package (except BIO1008 and PHY1001), Major Required and Major 
Elective courses will be included in the calculation of Major GPA for honours 
classification. 
 
[b] Streams of Specialization 
There are five streams of specialization: Methodology and Theory Stream, Finance and 
Economics Stream, Operations Management Stream, Life Science Stream, and 
Computing Stream. Students may choose to specialize in one of the five streams by 
selecting the courses as prescribed. To qualify for a specialized stream, students must 
complete at least 4 courses under the stream. Students can only declare one stream of 
specialization at their expected graduation term. Students may also decide not to 
declare any Stream, in which case they will not be subject to the Stream requirements.

修讀辦法 
 
二〇二四至二五年度及以後入學學生適用 
 
主修課程要求 
本課程分設兩項專修範圍，學生須選修其中一項專修範圍： 
(1) 先進材料；及 
(2) 智能材料。

1. Students enrolled in the Double Major Programme should normally spend four regular
terms at CUHK during the four years of study, except otherwise specified in 2. below.

terms at CUHK during the four years of study.

substitute/equivalent/alternative courses is available at this link

programmes for credit if (a) they are Year 3 or above, their cumulative GPA is 3.00 or above 
and the application is approved by the course offering unit; or (b) by special approval of the 
Dean of the Graduate School, following recommendation of student’s major School and the 
course offering unit. 
 
 
3

[b] Streams of Specialization 
 
There are five streams of specialization: Mathematical Statistics Stream, Statistical Methodology 
Stream, Biostatistics & Bioinformatics Stream, Financial Statistics Stream, and Computing & 
Machine Learning Stream. Students may choose to specialize in one of the five streams by selecting 
the courses as prescribed. To qualify for a specialized stream, students must complete at least 4 
courses under the stream. Students can only declare one stream of specializ ation at their expected 
graduation term. Students may also decide not to declare any Stream, in which case they will not be 
subject to the Stream requirements.

streams_text:
Streams of Specialization 
There are three streams of specialization: Translation, Interpreting, and Translation with 
New Technologies. Students may choose to specialize in one or two of the three streams 
by selecting the courses as prescribed. 
 
To qualify for a specialized str eam, students must complete at least 15 units of courses

[b] Streams of Specialization 
There are three streams of specialization: Translation, Interpreting, and Translation with 
New Technologies. Students may choose to specialize in one or two of the three streams 
by selecting the courses as prescribed.

under the stream.

streams/concentrations are required to provide the recommended 
pattern for each stream/concentration. 
 
Major Programme Requirement of Musicology
elective_text:
Elective courses which are academic courses (Composition/Research+Pedagogy) are marked 
with * in the form above. 
v). All courses listed in other majors or those offered as Free Electives by other schools can be taken 
as Free Electives at the instructor’s discretion. 
vi). The course title of MUS2501 is Introduction to Musicology for students who study the course 
before 2023-24 term 2. For students who study the course from 2023-24 term 2, the course title is 
Introduction to Historical Musicology. 
 
註： 
i). 專題研習是指以論文來評分的學術題目研究。 
ii). 特別專案是指表演實踐，例如全學院的歌劇演出。 
iii). 學生應盡量在第一學期修讀 一科三學分的英語科目，一科三 學分的中文科目及一科一 學
分的大學核心課程科目，及在第二學期修 讀一科三學分的英語科目及兩科 一學分的大學
核心課程科目。 
iv). 上表以*標注了自由選修科目中的理論類科目（作曲/研習+教學法）。 
8 
Last update: 14 July 2025 
v). 學生可在徵得授課老師同意後選修其他主修課程的科目及由其他學院開設的自由選修科
目作為自由選修科目。 
vi). 在 2023-24 學年第二学期前修讀 MUS2501，科目名稱為「音樂學導論」。在 2023-24 學年
第二學期及以後修讀科目，科目名稱為「歷史音樂學導論」。
